chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.S- 320 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution. 11.11.2025. Syed Waseem Hussain Jafferi, Advocate for petitioner. = Counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not wish to press this Lis. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Tufail
